let K_v := v.adicCompletion ℚ
  let O_v := v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let b_K := b.baseChange K_v
  let E := b_K.equivFunL
  rw [LinearMap.range_comp]
  apply IsCompact.image
  · let S := Set.pi Set.univ (fun (_ : Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V) ↦ (O_v : Set K_v))
    have hS : IsCompact S := isCompact_univ_pi (fun _ ↦ (NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ).isCompact_univ)
    have h_eq : (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) O_v.subtype.toIntLinearMap).range =
        Submodule.span O_v (Set.range b_K) := by
      rw [← (b.baseChange O_v).span_eq, Submodule.map_span]
      congr; ext; simp [Basis.baseChange]
    rw [h_eq]
    have h_span : (Submodule.span O_v (Set.range b_K) : Set (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V ⊗[ℤ] K_v)) = E.symm '' S := by
      ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_image, S, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies]
      constructor
      · intro h
        -- x ∈ span O_v (basis) means coordinates are in O_v
        use E x
        constructor
        · intro i
          -- x = Σ c_j b_j with c_j ∈ O_v. By uniqueness of basis, E x i = c_i ∈ O_v.
          rw [← b_K.sum_repr x] at h
          -- Actually, we can just use the property of span directly
          refine Submodule.span_induction h ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
          · rintro y ⟨j, rfl⟩
            simp only [map_zero, E, Basis.equivFunL_apply, Basis.equivFun_apply, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_apply]
            split_ifs <;> simp [zero_mem, one_mem]
          · simp [zero_mem]
          · intro _ _ _ _ h1 h2; simp [add_mem h1 h2]
          · intro a _ _ ha
            simp only [E, map_smul, Basis.equivFunL_apply, Basis.equivFun_apply]
            exact mul_mem a.2 ha
        · simp
      · rintro ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩
        -- x = Σ c_i b_i with c_i ∈ O_v. This is in span.
        simp only [E, Basis.equivFunL_symm_apply, Basis.equivFun_symm_apply]
        rw [Finsupp.total_apply]
        apply Submodule.sum_mem
        intro i _
        apply Submodule.smul_mem
        · exact hc i
        · apply Submodule.subset_span
          use i; simp
    rw [h_span]
    exact hS.image E.symm.continuous
  · exact (Aux.c_v_alg V v).continuous_toFun

  let B := b.baseChange K_v
  rw [← B.equivFunL.toContinuousLinearEquiv.toHomeomorph.isCompact_image_iff]
  convert IsCompact.pi (fun _ ↦ (NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers _ _).isCompact_univ.image (ContinuousAddSubmonoid.subtype _).continuous)
  ext f
  simp only [LinearMap.range_coe, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ,
    forall_true_left]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨x, rfl⟩
    simp only [B, Basis.baseChange, Basis.equivFun_apply, Basis.coord_apply]
    rw [← (b.baseChange O_v).sum_repr x, map_sum]
    simp only [LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Algebra.id.map_eq_id, RingHom.id_apply, Basis.baseChange_apply]
    rw [show ∀ c : O_v, ∀ x, LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) O_v.subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap (x ⊗ₜ[ℤ] c) = x ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (c : K_v) by intro c x; rfl]
    simp only [← TensorProduct.tmul_mul, mul_one]
    simp only [Basis.coord_sum_apply, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, if_true]
    exact Set.mem_range_self _
  · intro h
    refine ⟨∑ i, (h i).choose • (b.baseChange O_v i), ?_⟩
    simp only [map_sum, Basis.equivFun_apply, Basis.baseChange_apply]
    rw [show ∀ c : O_v, ∀ x, LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) O_v.subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap (c • (x ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (1 : O_v))) = c • (x ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (1 : K_v)) by
      intro c x
      simp only [TensorProduct.smul_tmul', smul_eq_mul, mul_one]
      rfl]
    simp only [Basis.coord_sum_apply, Basis.coord_apply, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_apply,
      Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, if_true]
    ext k
    rw [← (h k).choose_spec]
    rfl

let ι := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V
  let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let e : (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) ⊗[ℤ] v.adicCompletion ℚ ≃L[v.adicCompletion ℚ]
      (ι → v.adicCompletion ℚ) := {
    __ := (Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv b (v.adicCompletion ℚ)).trans
      (Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite _ _ _)
    continuous_toFun := IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _
    continuous_invFun := IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap _ }
  rw [← LinearMap.range_comp, ← LinearMap.range_comp,
    Homeomorph.isCompact_image (Aux.c_v V v).toHomeomorph,
    Homeomorph.isCompact_image e.toHomeomorph]
  let K := Set.pi Set.univ (fun (_ : ι) ↦
    Set.range (Subtype.val : v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ → v.adicCompletion ℚ))
  suffices Set.range (fun x ↦ e (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
      (v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ).subtype.toIntLinearMap x)) = K by
    rw [this]
    exact isCompact_univ_pi (fun _ ↦ isCompact_range_continuous
      (Continuous.subtype_val (continuous_iff_le_induced.mpr le_rfl)))
  ext f
  simp only [K, Set.mem_range, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies, Subtype.exists, exists_prop]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨t, rfl⟩ i
    induction t using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => simp [Subring.zero_mem]
    | tmul m r =>
      rw [LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv_tmul,
        Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite_apply, Finsupp.smul_apply, Finsupp.mapRange_apply]
      exact Subring.mul_mem _ r.2 (Subring.intCast_mem _ _)
    | add x y hx hy => simp only [map_add, Pi.add_apply]; exact Subring.add_mem _ (hx _) (hy _)
  · intro hf
    use Finset.univ.sum (fun i ↦ b i ⊗ₜ (hf i).choose)
    ext i
    simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Subtype.coe_toIntLinearMap, Finset.sum_apply]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_single i]
    · rw [Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv_tmul, Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite_apply,
        Finsupp.smul_apply, Finsupp.mapRange_apply, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_eq_same,
        map_one, smul_eq_mul, mul_one, (hf i).choose_spec]
    · intro j _ hj
      rw [Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv_tmul, Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite_apply,
        Finsupp.smul_apply, Finsupp.mapRange_apply, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_apply,
        if_neg hj.symm, map_zero, smul_zero]
    · intro hi; exact (hi (Finset.mem_univ i)).elim

let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let R_v := IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v
  let K_v := IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v
  let ψ := Aux.c_v V v
  let φ : (Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V → R_v) → V ⊗[ℚ] K_v :=
    fun x ↦ Finset.univ.sum fun i ↦ (x i : K_v) • ψ (b i ⊗ₜ 1)
  have h_cont : Continuous φ := continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦
    (continuous_smul_left _).comp (continuous_algebraMap _ _ |>.comp (continuous_apply i)))
  have : CompactSpace R_v := NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ v
  rw [(_ : _ = Set.range φ)]
  · exact isCompact_range h_cont
  ext z
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
    let b_R := b.baseChange R_v
    refine ⟨fun i ↦ b_R.repr y i, ?_⟩
    simp only [φ, AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
      LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Submodule.coe_subtype, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
      LinearMap.toIntLinearMap_apply]
    rw [← LinearEquiv.map_sum, ← map_sum]
    congr; simp only [b_R, Basis.baseChange_apply]
    rw [← b_R.sum_repr y, Finsupp.sum_fintype]
    · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro i _; rw [TensorProduct.RightActions.smul_tmul', mul_one]
    · intro; simp
  · rintro ⟨x, rfl⟩
    use Finset.univ.sum fun i ↦ b i ⊗ₜ[ℤ] (x i : R_v)
    simp only [φ, AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
      LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Submodule.coe_subtype, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
      LinearMap.toIntLinearMap_apply, map_sum, map_smul]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro i _
    rw [TensorProduct.RightActions.smul_tmul', mul_one, LinearEquiv.map_smul]

let ι := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpaceIndex ℚ V
  let bL := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let K := v.adicCompletion ℚ
  let O := v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let S := Set.pi (Set.univ : Set ι) (fun _ ↦ Set.range (algebraMap O K))
  let target (i : ι) : V ⊗[ℚ] K := Aux.c_v_alg V v (bL i ⊗ₜ[ℤ] 1)
  let f (c : ι → K) : V ⊗[ℚ] K := ∑ i, c i • target i
  have h_eq : ((Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) O.subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range = f '' S := by
    ext x
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
      let c := (bL.baseChange O).equivFun y
      refine ⟨fun i ↦ algebraMap O K (c i), ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp [S]
      · simp only [f, map_sum, map_smul, LinearEquiv.coe_coe,
          (bL.baseChange O).sum_equivFun_apply_smul_basis y]
        congr; ext i; simp
        exact congrArg (Aux.c_v_alg V v) (TensorProduct.smul_tmul' (c i) (bL i) 1)
    · rintro ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩
      rw [Set.mem_pi] at hc
      refine ⟨∑ i, (Classical.choose (hc i (Set.mem_univ i))) • (bL i ⊗ₜ[ℤ] 1), ?_⟩
      simp only [map_sum, map_smul, f]
      congr; ext i
      rw [← Classical.choose_spec (hc i (Set.mem_univ i))]
      simp only [LinearEquiv.coe_coe]
      exact congrArg (Aux.c_v_alg V v) (TensorProduct.smul_tmul' _ _ 1).symm
  rw [h_eq]
  apply IsCompact.image _ (continuous_finset_sum _ (fun i _ ↦ (continuous_apply i).smul continuous_const))
  apply IsCompact.pi_univ
  intro i
  exact isCompact_range (continuous_algebraMap O K)

let b := IntegralLattice.basis ℤ ℚ V
  let e := b.baseChange (v.adicCompletion ℚ)
  let S := v.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  let K := v.adicCompletion ℚ
  let to_finsupp := (Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite K K b.index).symm
  let ψ : (b.index → K) →ₗ[K] V ⊗[ℚ] K :=
    (Aux.c_v_alg V v).toLinearMap.comp (e.equivFun.symm.toLinearMap.comp to_finsupp.toLinearMap)
  have hψ_cont : Continuous ψ := ψ.continuous_of_finiteDimensional
  let s : Set (b.index → K) := Set.pi Set.univ (fun _ ↦ S)
  have hs : IsCompact s := by
    apply isCompact_univ_pi
    intro
    have : CompactSpace S := NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ v
    exact isCompact_univ.image continuous_subtype_val
  have h_eq : (((Aux.c_v_alg V v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
        (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
            S.subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range = ψ '' s := by
    ext x
    simp only [AddMonoidHom.mem_range, Set.mem_image, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies,
      ψ, LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom, LinearEquiv.coe_toLinearMap,
      Function.comp_apply, AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
      let bS := b.baseChange S
      use fun i ↦ bS.equivFun y i
      constructor
      · intro i; exact (bS.equivFun y i).2
      · dsimp [to_finsupp]
        congr
        simp only [e, bS, Basis.baseChange, Basis.equivFun, Basis.sum_repr,
          LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul]
        rw [← bS.sum_repr y]
        simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Submodule.coeSubtype,
          Submodule.coe_toAddMonoidHom, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul,
          mul_one]
        simp only [Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite_symm_apply]
        rfl
    · rintro ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩
      let bS := b.baseChange S
      let c_S : b.index →₀ S := (Finsupp.equivFunOnFinite).symm (fun i ↦ ⟨c i, hc i⟩)
      use bS.equivFun.symm c_S
      dsimp [to_finsupp]
      congr
      simp only [e, bS, Basis.baseChange, Basis.equivFun, Basis.sum_repr]
      rw [← (bS.equivFun.symm _).map_sum]
      simp only [map_sum, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul, Submodule.coeSubtype,
        Submodule.coe_toAddMonoidHom, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul,
        mul_one, Subtype.coe_mk]
      simp only [Finsupp.linearEquivFunOnFinite_symm_apply, c_S, Finsupp.equivFunOnFinite_symm_apply]
      congr; ext i; rfl
  rw [h_eq]
  exact hs.image hψ_cont

let O_v := IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v
  let K_v := IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v
  let Lat := IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V
  let f : Lat ⊗[ℤ] O_v →ₗ[O_v] Lat ⊗[ℤ] K_v :=
    LinearMap.lTensor Lat (Algebra.linearMap O_v K_v)
  haveI := NumberField.instCompactSpaceAdicCompletionIntegers ℚ
  have : CompactSpace (Lat ⊗[ℤ] O_v) := Module.Finite.compactSpace
  have : IsCompact (LinearMap.range f) := by
    rw [LinearMap.range_eq_image]
    exact isCompact_univ.image (IsModuleTopology.continuous_of_linearMap f)
  rw [Set.range_comp]
  exact (Aux.c_v V v).toHomeomorph.isCompact_image.mpr this
